title: 10 best herbal essential oils for dry nose
description: Eucalyptus globulus, also known as Tasmanian blue gum, essential oils helps with dry nose because of its decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's active compound, eucalyptol, helps to break down mucus, reducing congestion and promoting drainage. Its expectorant properties also aid in loosening and removing excess mucus from the nasal passages, providing quick relief from dryness and discomfort.
